characters.name: Koro-sensei
alt_names: Prince of the Fateful Eternal Wind
characters.description:
__Height:__ ~300cm (~9'10")

He is a teacher for class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School and the main antihero of Ansatsu Kyoushitsu. He claims responsibility for blowing up the moon into a permanent crescent shape and plans to destroy the Earth in a year after teaching the students of class 3-E the art of assassination. His name comes from korosenai (殺せない), meaning "cannot be killed", and sensei (先生), meaning teacher. In this way, he is literally called the unkillable teacher.

~!Later in the story he is revealed to have been original reaper named Ryushi Korogane.!~

characters.name: Nagisa Shiota
characters.description:
__Height:__ 159 cm (5'2.5")
__Class:__ Class 3-E 

He is one of the students in Class 3-E. Nagisa is seen as one of the weakest students in the class due to his small stature and mediocre physical abilities that are comparable to a girl. However, he is actually the most talented to become an assassin out of all the students, something acknowledged by Korosensei and Karasuma. He is able to draw closer while hiding his bloodlust to make a surprise attack and able to make his opponents falter through his bloodlust alone.  Nagisa usually writes Korosensei's weaknesses that at first seen minor (since it doesn't look like major weaknesses), but eventually revealed to be useful since once they're able to almost kill Korosensei because of one of his weaknesses that is the same as the one that Nagisa has written down in his note.  Outwardly friendly and polite to his friends and everyone, he hides a somewhat darker side of him as an assassin that won't be able to be found out during daily classes and will only be shown during training and assassination time. According to Karasuma, whenever Nagisa unleashes his killing intent, he isn't training and truly goes for a kill.

~!In the end, he kills [Koro-Sensei](https://anilist.co/character/65643/Korosensei).!~

~!In the epilogue, 7 years later, Nagisa becomes a teacher of Paradise High School's Class 3-5, Deciding to follow in Koro-sensei's steps.!~

characters.name: Karma Akabane
alt_names: Mr. Humiliated Failure in The First Semester
characters.description:
**Height:** 175 cm

A student in Korosensei's class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School who had been suspended from school due to his violent behavior.  He excels at using weaponry and foul play and is the only student thus far to have successfully injured Korosensei. Despite this, he is actually rather smart and manages a perfect score on one of Korosensei's tests. He and Nagisa were in the same class during their 1st and 2nd years at Kunugigaoka.

characters.name: Tadaomi Karasuma
characters.description: He is a government worker associated with the Ministry of Defense. He first appeared announcing Korosensei's deal with the government and their mission to assassinate him before the end of the year. He later became the assistant teacher and P.E. instructor of class 3-E, using his lessons to train the students in assassination techniques. He is well known among militaries for his outstanding reputation and is a powerful individual, which he has proven when he easily overpowered Irina's master, who is a retired professional hitman, and even Korosensei himself is afraid upon seeing his capability for the first time. He is strict, but kind man, though he keeps a distance between himself and the students due to his status as an agent and his own professionalism. He is one of a few who is very perceptive enough to see Nagisa's talent as an assassin. He seems to know Korosensei's past, though he has no intention to indulge into it further.

characters.name: Irina Jelavic
alt_names: イリーナ・イェラビッチ
characters.description:
__Occupation:__ Professional Hitman, Part-time Foreign Language Teacher 

She is a professional hitwoman who is hired to kill Korosensei by becoming a part-time foreign language teacher in class 3-E. She uses her charms to seduce Korosensei, making him at first obeys to whatever she asks. However, her first assassination attempt was foiled when Korosensei able to suppressed her 3-men's attacks, ending in her humiliation and swore revenge. She teaches the students how to seduce people from other countries, so that with this method, they can learn foreign languages, and usually would punish male students who failed answering her questions during her lesson by kissing them.    

Irina is a deceitful, wily and beguiling individual; she frequently uses her charm to influence and manipulate her targets. She can easily befriend people, if she so chooses, and entice them to let down their defenses and become vulnerable to her.Seduction is primarily the technique she employs, and it is her area of expertise. Irina is a professional assassin who excels at handling infiltration and approaching targets. She possesses strong conversational skills in ten languages, and a proven track record of eleven jobs in countries all over the world.

characters.name: Ritsu
characters.description:
An artificial intelligence developed in Norway and sent to Class 3-E as a transfer student to dispose of Korosensei, able to learn his movement patterns and perfect her shooting skills in order to eventually kill him. After receiving a few modifications from Korosensei, she develops a conscience and becomes friends with the rest of class 3-E, who give her her shortened nickname. Thanks to her processing power, she frequently helps with Intel gathering and communications and usually interacts with others via a smartphone application developed by her classmates.

She is portrayed by Kanna Hashimoto in the live action movie.

characters.name: Kaede Kayano
characters.description:
She is one of Nagisa's classmates and close friends, being the one who is mostly seen with him. She hasn't shown any capabilities during her training to become an assassin, and so far has only been shown to discuss Korosensei's weaknesses along with Nagisa. She experiences a slight inferiority complex when it comes to sex appeal, resulting her to get angry whenever there's a woman with big breasts and readily protest.

~!it's revealed later in the story that she's [Aguri Yukimura's](https://anilist.co/character/207936/Aguri-Yukimura) younger sister, Akari Yukimura and her real birthday is on November 9.!~

characters.name: Itona Horibe
characters.description: Transfer student who aims to kill Koro-sensei. He is the second assassin transfer student to arrive at Class 3-E, following the previous assassin, Ritsu. He initially served as the secondary antagonist, before ultimately joining Class E for good. After being abandoned by Shiro and befriending Terasaka and his gang, Itona has since become more mellow and humble, and is now able to admit people are stronger than him, while still retaining his brutal honesty. He has also shown to be a very observant and creative individual.

characters.name: Manami Okuda
characters.description: She is a student in class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School, taught by Korosensei.   Okuda is shy and rather introverted. She admits that she isn't really good with surprise attacks and expressing things in language. She excels in chemistry and capable of making poisons for assassinations.

characters.name: Tomohito Sugino
characters.description: He is one of the students and Nagisa's close friends. He used to be a basketball player in their school's basketball club until he was assigned into class 3-E, making him kicked out from the club. He dreams to become a professional baseball player like his idol, Arita, and emulates his techniques to improve his own performance in baseball and is shown to very dedicated to it. He also sometimes used his baseball techniques in his attempts to kill Korosensei. He has a crush on Yukiko.

characters.name: Megu Kataoka
characters.description: She is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. She is assigned to Class 3-E, where she trains to become a professional assassin, with her teacher as the target. She is one of the two class representatives of Class 3-E, with the other being Yūma Isogai.  (Source: Ansatsu Kyoushitsu Wikia)

characters.name: Yuma Isogai
characters.description: He is a student and class rep in class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School, taught by Korosensei.

characters.name: Yukiko Kanzaki
characters.description: She is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. She is assigned to Class 3-E, where she trains to become a professional assassin, with her teacher as the target.   Yukiko is diligent, ladylike, and cordial; although she does not particularly stand out, she is popular with her classmates. A very considerate individual, she had, on one occasion, volunteered to buy drinks for everyone in her class. Yukiko is deliberative and an excellent organizer. She was responsible for structuring the schedule for Class 3-E's trip to Kyoto, and her work had impressed Korosensei. Furthermore, she is adept in considering all factors before making a decision, which is why she had chosen the virtually unoccupied Gion District as the ideal setting for the assassination to take place.

characters.name: Takuya Muramatsu
characters.description: Takuya Muramatsu is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He is assigned to Class 3-E, where he trains to become a professional assassin, with his teacher as the target. His partners are Ryōma Terasaka and Taiji Yoshida.   Muramatsu is an inconsiderate individual, unmindful to the consequences of his actions. He is willing to resort to any means in order to escape contemptible circumstances. He collaborates with Ryōma Terasaka and Taiji Yoshida, and together they pressure others to act according to their bidding.

characters.name: Sousuke Sugaya
characters.description: He is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He is assigned to Class 3-E, where he trains to become a professional assassin, with his teacher as the target.  Sousuke is exceptionally skilled at drawing and sculpting. His proficiency ranges from posters to disguise masks; he can make them with relative ease. He is also strongly individualistic, and launches attacks against Korosensei in a capricious, unpredictable manner; for instance, he offers to draw a Henna tattoo on Korosensei, but secretly had the Anti-Sensei bullets grounded into a fine powder and then mixed with the Henna paint.  (Source: Assassination Classroom wikia)

characters.name: Ryouma Terasaka
characters.description: He is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He is assigned to Class 3-E, where he trains to become a professional assassin, with his teacher as the target. His partners are Takuya Muramatsu and Taiji Yoshida.   Terasaka is a rash, selfish and impatient individual. Desperate to escape from the miserable circumstances of being part of the dropout class, he is willing to resort to any means, even if the methods may be immoral.He holds no regards for the injuries of his comrades who provide assistance.  However, Terasaka possesses relative leadership skills, as he is usually accompanied by his peers, Takuya Muramatsu and Taiji Yoshida.He persuades others to do his bidding by being direct and intrusively forward, as indicated when he pressures Nagisa Shiota to carry out an assassination of Korosensei by reminding him of the harsh conditions they live in.

characters.name: Taisei Yoshida
characters.description: He is a student of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He is assigned to Class 3-E, where he trains to become a professional assassin, with his teacher as the target. His partners are Ryōma Terasaka and Takuya Muramatsu.   Yoshida is an inconsiderate individual, unmindful to the consequences of his actions. He is willing to resort to any means in order to escape contemptible circumstances. He collaborates with Ryōma Terasaka and Takuya Muramatsu, and together they pressure others to act according to their bidding.

characters.name: Taiga Okajima
characters.description: He is a student in Korosensei's class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School.   Okajima is the class pervert and is rather open about it. As with Rio Nakamura, Okajima is known to like peeping. He likes to read erotica magazines and even claimed to be a brother of Korosensei and Itona Horibe for doing so. At the start of July, he enjoys looking at the girls' more exposed skin.

characters.name: Yuzuki Fuwa
characters.description: She is a student in class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School, taught by Korosensei.   Fuwa has an imaginative personality, as evidenced with her like of reading the Weekly Shōnen Jump magazine.

characters.name: Gakuhou Asano
characters.description: He is the board chairman and administrative head of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He has made the academy into the foremost in Japan in the ten years since its founding.  Gakuhō is a reasonable, prudent, and shrewd individual; he is primarily known for his cool-headed rationalism. He is a proponent of logic and efficiency, and handles matters accordingly. An able and competent administrator, he is resolved in removing factors that may upset the intended balance.

characters.name: Touka Yada
characters.description:
She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. She is the big sister of Class 3-E and one of the most enthusiastic students about learning the art of infiltration from Irina. She's been described as being adult-like and cool to the point that Kayano admits that she's attracted to her despite her large bust.

Yada does not like violence, which is why she commits herself to negotiation in order avoid fighting.

characters.name: Sumire Hara
characters.description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Hara is one of the most passive members of the class where she frequently acts as support in assassination attempts with her ability to assess the situation and herself. She is usually regarded as a motherly figure, due to her ability to cook and care for the class.

characters.name: Hiroto Maehara
characters.description: He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Maehara is a nice guy and in every sense of the word, a playboy. He has a "live the moment" attitude about life in general. He is one of the few that is popular in the whole school despite being in the E Class. Despite that attitude, he is a caring person and isn't the type to pick on someone weaker than him. He also falls into the type of being honest, and often reacts strongly to things.

characters.name: Rio Nakamura
characters.description:
She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. She was a former elementary school genius but felt lonely and longed to be normal. When she got to middle school, she began shirking off her studies which landed her in Class 3-E.
She loves teasing the other students in her class (sometimes together with Karma Akabane)

characters.name: Kirara Hazama
characters.description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Hazama is a quiet girl who loves reading, preferring to sit in the shade with a book rather than swim during summer gym classes and wants to become a librarian. She even recommended to Itona the novel, The Count of Monte Cristo, though accidentally spoiled the ending. She prefers dark stories and horror novels, and because of this also has an interest in the occult which she displayed when she attempted to use a curse on Korosensei.

characters.name: Koutarou Takebayashi
characters.description: He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Takebayashi is mostly a quiet person. However, he seems somewhat eccentric in his behavior and stands out as the oddball in the class. He also seems to be clumsy at physical activity, having ping pong balls hit his glasses while playing with others and nearly losing balance in one of Tadaomi Karasuma's lessons. He is also obsessed with anime, at one point stating "A girl isn't a true girl until she loses the third D" implying he likes anime girls more than real women. He also enjoys going to maid cafes.

characters.name: Kouki Mimura
characters.description: He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E.

characters.name: Masayoshi Kimura
characters.description: He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Kimura is one of the relatively proactive students when it comes to assassination and aims to claim the 10 billion yen reward.

characters.name: Hinano Kurahashi
characters.description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Hinano's personality is an energetic and positive girl and is always seen with a smile on her face regardless of whether she's trying to assassinate Korosensei, or whatever else. Hinano is also a passionate animal and nature lover.

characters.name: Hinata Okano
characters.description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. In her initial appearances, Okano was often shown to be serious with a relatively neutral expression. As the series goes on, she's later shown to also be playful in addition to being serious. She is also described as someone who acts before she thinks.

characters.name: Ryuunosuke Chiba
characters.description:
__Height::__ 172 cm (5’8”)
__School:__ Kunugigaoka Junior High School
__Class:__ 3-E
__Seat Number:__ 15

He is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E of Kunugigaoka Junior High School. Chiba is a serious and stoic boy. He's very calm and doesn't talk a lot. He is the best marksman among all of Class 3-E. He excels in spatial calculation and, as such, is unmatched in long distance shooting. His abilities have even earned him the praises of Lovro, a hitman dealer and a retired assassin.

characters.name: Rinka Hayami
characters.description: She is a student in Korosensei's Class 3-E. Rinka is a very stoic, businesslike and professional girl who has been compared to a working adult along with Chiba. As a result of her serious demeanor, she can be quite straightforward and direct.

characters.name: Gakushuu Asano
characters.description: A student in class 3-A in Kunugigaoka Junior High School. He is the student council president and the son of the Board Chairman, Gakuhou Asano. He is a genius student who, like many main building students, look down upon class 3-E.

characters.name: Kunudon
characters.description: Kunudon is the mascot of Kununigoaka. He hates E class and is a propaganda tool used by the director.

characters.name: Ren Sakakibara
characters.description: is a student in Class 3-A in Kunugigaoka Junior High School and one of the Big Five. He is also the Student Council secretary.

characters.name: Smog
characters.description: One of three assassins in Okinawa along with Gastro and Grip. He specializes in creating/making poisons.

characters.name: Gastro
characters.description: One of three assassins in Okinawa, along with Smog and Grip. He loves the taste of a gun so much that he uses it as a utensil.

characters.name: Yuuji Norita
characters.description: A rich teenage boy. Although he is initially lazy and rides on his father's coattails, with encouragement from Nagisa he decides to change himself for the better.

characters.name: Shiro
characters.description:
A mysterious man in white clothes who hides secrets about Koro-sensei's past.

~!His real name is Kotarou Yanagisawa!~

characters.name: Reaper
characters.description: Before becoming the Reaper, he was born in an extremely wealthy family. One night, his father was killed by the original Reaper. As he witnessed his father's assassination from a window, he fell head over heels over the act, calling it "a beautiful skill"; in turn, this motivated him to become an assassin under the current Reaper's tutelage.

characters.name: Sakura Kiyashiki
characters.description: Sakura is a young girl that Nagisa meets when Class 3-E helps out at Wakaba Park's nursery.

characters.name: Matsukata
characters.description: Matsukata is the principal of Wakaba Park cram school.

characters.name: Rikuto Ikeda
characters.description: Rikuto Ikeda was one of the three first students in Gakuhō Asano's cram school 10 years prior to the Assassination Classroom series along with Nakai and Mori.

characters.name: Natsuhiko Koyama
characters.description: Natsuhiko Koyama is a student in Class 3-A in Kunugigaoka Junior High School and the president of the Biology Club who is one of the Big Five.

characters.name: Aguri Yukimura
characters.description: Aguri Yukimura is the former teacher of Class 3-E.

characters.name: Tomoya Seo
characters.description: Tomoya Seo is a student in Class 3-A in Kunugigaoka Junior High School and one of the Five Virtuosos. He is also the Student Assembly Chairman.

characters.name: Red Eye
characters.description: Sniper hired to kill Koro-sensei during the Kyoto trip.

characters.name: Kazutaka Shindo
characters.description: Kazutaka Shindou is a student in Class 3-A in Kunugigaoka Junior High School and plays in the baseball team.

characters.name: Lovro Brovski
characters.description: Lovro is a hitman dealer who was once a talented assassin. He is the Japanese government's only link with the world of hitmen.

characters.name: Chousuke Takada
characters.description: Chosuke Takada is a student in Class 3-D of Kunugigaoka Junior High School who is often seen with Nobuta Tanaka.

characters.name: Nobuta Tanaka
characters.description: Nobuta Tanaka  is a student in Class 3-D of Kunugigaoka Junior High School who is often seen with Chosuke Takada.

characters.name: Hiromi Shiota
characters.description: [Nagisa](https://anilist.co/character/65645/Nagisa-Shiota)'s mother.

characters.name: Bobobo-bo Bo-bobo
alt_names: ボボボーボ・ボーボボ
characters.description: This is the cool and incomprehensible hero, swarthy and musclebound, sporting sunglasses and a large golden afro. His hair is 24-karat gold but is usually said to be yellow or blonde; some viewers even argue about its true color. He is called Bo-bobo for short. He refuses to let people call him Bo. He fights with his nose hair using the Hanage Shinken (sometimes "Super Fist of the Nose Hair", other times "Snot Fou-You"), as well as simply confusing his enemies. His only weakness, which he discovered while visiting the world of Blabsalot, is the fact that he doesn't have as many deadly attacks. He believes that the Fist of the Nose Hair is sacred and that he shouldn't overuse it. He has three brothers and one sister. Bo-BoBo directs small "micromovies" in his own movie theatre "Bo-BoBo Gekijou" (Bo-BoBo Theater, but also called other names in the dub). He apparently has some control over an army of stuffed teddy bears which are seen in many episodes. There is an apparently large colony of tiny humans and humanoid boogers living in his nose. They sometimes aid him in battle.

characters.name: Tetsuya Kuroko
characters.description:
__Height:__ 168 cm (5'6")
__School:__ Seirin High 
__Number:__ #11  
__Speciality:__ Simple sleight of hand tricks  
__Motto:__ (Every encounter is a) once-in-a-lifetime encounter  

The phantom sixth member of the "Generation of Miracles." He has a very weak presence and often seemingly appears out of nowhere as a result. 

At the first glance all of his abilities seem to be below average, but despite being bad at dribbling and shooting he can be a dangerous opponent. He specializes in circulating passes without being seen. Because of his largely complementary skill set, Kuroko considers himself a "shadow" whose goal is to help his "light" achieve greatness.   

~!After being defeated by Aomine, Kuroko trains himself to evolve his play style. He overcomes his previous limitations, and has developed the ability to move past players unseen while dribbling the ball, creating his own 'vanishing' drive. After his misdirection effect runs out, Kuroko can force the opponent to just focus on him, allowing his teammates to go by unnoticed. Thanks to Aomine's coaching later on, Kuroko also develops some shooting skill, making his own shooting style called "Phantom Shot" where the ball disappears.!~

characters.name: Nika Tamiya
characters.description: Nika is a person with the ability of a switch girl. She can change personalities just like that. There are only 2 people in her school that know this about her. Her best friend from childhood and a handsome guy who also has an On and Off mode like her.

characters.name: Kusuo Saiki
characters.description:
**Height:** 167 cm

Saiki has an extremely uncaring, neutral personality. As a gifted psychic that can do anything he wants, he has long stopped caring about the world; however, he has shown to be extremely cautious, as he often runs from Nendou, the only person he fears and is prone to immediately teleporting to faraway places upon spotting an insect. Saiki has a sweet tooth, so he loves sweets, especially Coffee Jelly.

Fourteen days after his birth, Kusuo uttered his first word without moving his mouth and 1 month after birth he took his first step in midair. At the age of 1 was the first time Kusuo has voluntarily used his abilities, when his mother said they were out of mirin, Kusuo teleported away and returned with several bottles of mirin.

Saiki is a gifted psychic. Having obtained his powers since birth, the first signs of Saiki's powers came from when he was able to hear the voices of his parents and he subsequently telepathically spoke back to them. Two months later, he demonstrated the ability to walk in the air. Saiki has stated that in three days, he can wipe out humanity. The full extent of all of his abilities is unknown.
